# RefreshCw

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::RefreshCw;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        RefreshCw { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
rotate, reload, rerun, synchronise, synchronize, arrows, circular, cycle

## Categories
arrows
